[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 10000100 2
4 10100100 3
5 10100000 2
6 10100100 3
7 00000000 a

01 11011111 7
12 10100111 5
23 11111111 a
34 11111001 6
45 11101010 5
56 01000100 2
67 00000110 2
70 11010110 5

13 10100111 5
24 11111001 6
35 11101100 5
46 01010001 3
57 10111101 6
60 00101111 5
71 11110110 6

25 11101100 5

47 10101000 3

72 10101110 5
